subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared in truth - He, verily, is the One mentioned in former ages [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر بالحق انه لهو المذکور فی القرون الاولی
subcodes.subjects: @high station of learning, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power of prayer, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
